Because Wen Yu's daughter was diagnosed with congenital heart disease, she kept silent about the mistake so that her daughter can receive the best medical care with Song Nian's wealth.

programme.title: BUNGA CINTA BERSEMI DI BENGKEL
programme.desc: When Fery’s (Hardy Fadillah) delivery van breaks down, he ends up in a heated argument with a female mechanic named Nabila (Naomi Zaskia). Their parents, who are old friends, notice that their children's personalities don't match traditional gender roles. To 'fix' them, they agree to a swap: Nabila must work at Fery’s flower shop, while Fery must get his hands dirty at Nabila’s garage.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 163
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Kasih Paham Bang Ilmu Bangun Rumah Tangga
programme.desc: After her sister’s passing, Jeny (Nabila Zavira) is forced to marry her brother-in-law, Ivan (Cemal Faruk). The two can't stand each other, but their families are determined to make it work, pushing them into a honeymoon and demanding they produce an heir as soon as possible.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 617
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 111
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: GURIH CINTA TELUR ASIN
programme.desc: Varrel (Dimaz Andrean) has been traumatized by salted eggs since childhood. After accidentally injuring Babeh Jali and ruining his daughter Kinara's (Yuki Kato) salted egg stock, Varrel is forced into a unique punishment: he must work for Kinara to learn the art-and the value-of the very food he fears the most.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 163
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mas Mawar Adalah Maut
programme.desc: Tama (El Ryan) is a rose seller who had to drop out of medical school after his parents went bankrupt. His life changes when he rescues Sheina (Indah Nicole), a doctor and girlfriend of a famous celebrity, after she suffers from amnesia following a tragic accident. As Tama cares for her, a beautiful bond begins to form between the fallen student and the forgotten doctor

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 617
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: LOE YANG LUV GUA YANG KEDER
programme.desc: Zeno’s (25) life shatters when he discovers that Masha, the woman he loves, is cheating on him with his own cousin, Panca. To make matters worse, Zeno learns that Panca is plotting to overthrow Zeno's father from his successful oil company to seize the director's chair for himself.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 112
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: TOLONG PERMAK HATIKU
programme.desc: A traveling seamstress specializing in clothing alterations meets a handsome man during a roadside incident. Though sparks fly instantly, their romance faces a major obstacle: the man is already committed to someone else.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 164
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Halumu dan Haluku Jadi Halufyu
programme.desc: Alya’s (Callista Arum) car is blocked by Thoriq’s (Kevin Hillers) wonton cart. While looking for her boyfriend, Ozi, Alya discovers a painful truth: Ozi has been dating another woman named Hana for three years. After a public breakup at Thoriq’s stall, Alya and Thoriq grow closer, sparking a jealous rage in Hana.

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN
programme.desc: Nadia (Debi Sagita) is rescued from thugs by Boni (Ridwan Ghani), though all of his medicines are destroyed in the scuffle. Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. Their bond deepens when Nadia chooses Boni's village as the subject for her university thesis.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 165
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Usia 2 Bulan Udah Jadi Apa? Jadi-an
programme.desc: Yogi’s (Ridho Illahi) life brightens up with the arrival of a new PE teacher, Wina (Nabila Zavira). He is captivated when she tells him, 'True strength doesn't just come from the body, but from a strong mind and heart.' However, Yogi’s admiration turns to heartbreak when he discovers Wina has given her heart to someone else.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 619
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: TENGKULAK KECE IDAMAN

Impressed by his selfless care for the villagers, Nadia mistakenly believes Boni is a doctor. Touched by his kindness, she gifts him her late brother's unused car. programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 11
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Chapalrela - EP 3
programme.desc: Anjang Merah kematian ibu dan terpaksa tinggal dengan ibu tirinya, Mak Jenab dan saudara tirinya Jali Puteh. Anjang Merah sentiasa didera juga ditugaskan menjaga kandang kambing ayahnya, Pak Manap.

programme.title: Cik Bunga Encik Sombong - EP 3
programme.desc: Tidak semena-mena Intan Asnidar yang menghantar bunga menjadi tunangan Harris Isqandar apabila gadis yang sepatutnya menjadi tunangannya melarikan diri. Apakah kesudahannya?

programme.title: Kalau Berani Kampung Stail - EP 2
programme.desc: Setiap minggu Sherry dan ketua kumpulan akan di bawa ke kampung yang berlainan bersama artis jemputan untuk menolong ketua kumpulan memenangi perlawanan mingguan

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 8
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: Aku Dan Tok Wan - EP 13
programme.desc: Tok Wan di hantar untuk duduk bersama cucunya, Amir kerana Tok Wan menghidapi kencing manis dan di arahkan tinggal bersama ahli keluarga untuk mendapat jagaan rapi

programme.title: Bonda Bonding - EP 3
programme.desc: Setiap minggu, saksikan artis kegemaran anda apabila mereka mempunyai pelbagai aktiviti yang mereka suka luangkan bersama ibu mereka yang tersayang. Jangan terlepas detik istimewa bersama mereka!

programme.title: Alang Menanti Malang - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Megat Extend - EP 18
programme.desc: Kisah komedi kehidupan di kampus sekumpulan pelajar yang tinggal bersama-sama di rumah milik senior mereka, Megat, pelajar senior yang 'in denial' dan tidak mahu untuk meninggalkan kehidupan kampus.

programme.title: Destinasi Ke Destinasi - EP 4
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk golongan semua.

programme.title: Tabung Gelak Warna - EP 29
programme.desc: Rancangan menarik untuk tontonan anda semua.

programme.title: Sembang Pacak S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Sebuah drama untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tapao - EP 4
programme.desc: Kembara mencari makan menyajikan keindahan visual. Tapi bagaimana jika hidangan itu dibungkus? Adakah sama enak di meja restoran? Kena dengan namanya, Tapao mencari jawapan di sebalik persoalan ini.

programme.title: Dahlia - EP 14
programme.desc: Dahlia memiliki segalanya, namun semuanya musnah akibat sikap khianat kawan baiknya sendiri yang ingin merampas semua miliknya termasuk suami, anak & harta.

programme.title: Kennot Brain 2021 - EP 28
programme.desc: Saksikan Alif Farhan & Ain Edruce bersama tetamu jemputan mereka yang pasti kecoh sambil merungkai video-video pelik yang 'trending' pada minggu ini.

programme.title: Gado Gado 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Naluri Hati - EP 12
programme.desc: Pada hari perkahwinannya, Dinda teragak-agak kerana dia akan berkahwin dengan orang yang tidak dicintainya. Namun, satu kejadian berlaku dan menyebabkan Dinda mengalami amnesia separa.

programme.title: Betul Ke Bohong Sayang - EP 4
programme.desc: Kesinambungan dari program popular "Betul Ke Bohong" yang menyaksikan pasangan-pasangan bersaing untuk mengelak dari dikenakan kejutan elektrik.

programme.title: Balapan
programme.desc: Kisah empat orang remaja yang telah menjadi musuh sejak sekian lama di lapangan balapan acara pecut 100meter peringkat daerah Selangor dan akhirnya menjadi sahabat seperjuangan.

programme.title: Warung Sepahtu - EP 3
programme.desc: Jom lepak santai sambil sembang dan bergelak tawa bersama Jep, Shuib, Rahim & Pak Ya dalam Warung Sepahtu selain turut menampilkan tetamu undangan yang pasti menghiburkan.

programme.title: Kau Rasa? - EP 2
programme.desc: Rancangan 'prank' yang merakamkan reaksi spontan orang ramai dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Sketso - EP 1
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan sketsa komedi tentang pencegahan kemalangan untuk pekerja di bawa khas oleh Pertubuhan Keselamatan Pekerja Sosial (PERKESO)

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 15
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi

programme.title: Jihan Show - EP 1
programme.desc: Riuh rendah dibuatnya apabila Jihan berkumpul dengan teman-teman. Pelbagai topik jadi perbualan bila semua "girlfriends" bersatu.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Legenda Puteri Qaseh kembali untuk musim ke-2! Sebagai Permaisuri Kayajaya, dia menghadapi cabaran konspirasi merampas takhta, wabak Achum mengancam nyawa dan dijodohkan dengan Putera Nusaria.

programme.title: Meja Bulat Sepahtu - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai yang di hos kan oleh Sepahtu dengan pelbagai topik menarik dan terkini.

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 11
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Layan Je Maharaja Lawak - EP 10
programme.desc: Rancagan menarik untuk tontonan seisi keluarga.

programme.title: Yak Yak Yey - EP 6
programme.desc: Himpunan sketsa komedi pendek pecah perut yang menggabungkan selebriti tanah air terdiri daripada pelawak,pelakon,penyanyi dan pempengaruh media sosial .

programme.title: Polis Sentri The Series - EP 4
programme.desc: Polis Sentri ialah sebuah program variasi yang menampilkan 10 artis tanah air termasuk personaliti sosial media. Misi mereka adalah untuk berjaya dalam semua cabaran yang diberi.

programme.title: CTDK-ation - EP 1
programme.desc: Program realiti perjalanan Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza 'VACATION' adalah program menampilkan keluarga besar Dato Sri Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Alone
programme.desc: Two twin sisters who lived by one promise - 'We will always be together. We will never separate'. Later, the ghost of dead haunt the surviving sister. Release Year: 2015 Director: Bhushan Patel

programme.title: The Xpose
programme.desc: Rival actresses Zara and Chandni clash publicly. When Zara is found dead, Chandni becomes the main suspect until journalist Ravi tries to uncover the shocking truth. Release Year: 2014 Director: Anant Mahadevan

programme.title: Aitraaz
programme.desc: Raj Malhotra is falsely accused of sexual harassment by his boss's wife, leading to a tense courtroom battle to prove his innocence. Release Year: 2004 Director: Abbas Alibhai Burmawalla,Mastan Alibhai Burmawalla Awards: Best Editing: HuSSain A. Burmawala, Best Sound Recording: Rakesh Ranjan, Best Sound Re-Recording: Anup Dev Awards of the International Indian Film Academy; Best Actor in a Villainous Role: Priyanka Chopra Filmfare Awards

programme.title: Mili
programme.desc: Mili dreams of Canada but gets trapped inside a freezer. Alone and freezing, she must survive the night using hope, strength, and her will to live. Release Year: 2022 Director: Mathukutty Xavier

programme.title: Double Dhamaal
programme.desc: Four lazy friends dream of real estate riches but are cheated by Kabir, pushing them to chase him down and reclaim their lost pride and money. Release Year: 2011 Director: Indra Kumar Awards: 2012 Winner Popular Award- Best Comic Actor- Riteish Deshmukh

programme.title: Dhadak
programme.desc: Madhu and Parthavi's love rises above social status, but their families oppose strongly. Left with no choice, they elope, with Parthavi's father and brother in hot pursuit. Release Year: 2018 Director: Shashank Khaitan

programme.title: Mr. & Mrs. Khiladi
programme.desc: A slacker must impress a wealthy man to marry her daughter. Release Year: 1997 Director: David Dhawan

programme.title: Chatrapathi
programme.desc: Shivaji and his family are uprooted from their community in Sri Lanka and wind up as bonded labourers in Visakhapatnam. The situation worsens when his jealous stepbrother enters his life. Release Year: 2023 Director: V. V. Vinayak

programme.title: 1920 London
programme.desc: After her husband becomes possessed by an evil spirit, a noble woman turns to her former lover to perform an exorcism. Release Year: 2016 Director: Tinu Suresh Desai

programme.title: Entertainment
programme.desc: Akhil Akshay Kumar finds out that he is the heir of 300 million. However, his life goes Topsy-turvy when he learns that the empire goes to Entertainment a dog. 2014. Release Year: 2014 Director: Sajid, Farhad Awards: 2014 Winner Reader's Choice- Best Actor in a Negative Role- Sonu Sood

programme.title: Ghayal Once Again
programme.desc: Four teens accidentally film a murder involving a celebrity. With Ajay's help, they fight to expose the truth while staying one step ahead of dangerous enemies. Release Year: 2016 Director: Sunny Deol

programme.title: Krrish 3
programme.desc: Krrish and his father must defeat human-animal mutants created by an evil genius, Kaal, who is hell-bent on destroying the world. His vile army is led by a chameleon mutant, Kaya. Release Year: 2013 Director: Rakesh Roshan Awards: Apsara Film Producers Guild Awards- Hall of Fame, Best Special Effects-Redchillies.VFX . Awards of the International Indian Film Academy- Best Action, Best Special Effects,

programme.title: The Hero - Love Story of a Spy
programme.desc: Arun is an Indian undercover agent enlisted to stop ISI chief Ishaq Khan. The village girl Reshma helps him but endangers her own life. Release Year: 2003 Director: Anil Sharma

programme.desc: Four lazy friends dream of real estate riches but are cheated by Kabir, pushing them to chase him down and reclaim their lost pride and money. Release Year: 2011 Director: Indra Kumar Awards: 2012 Winner Popular Award- Best Comic Actor- Riteish Deshmukh

programme.title: Looop Lapeta
programme.desc: When her boyfriend loses a mobster's cash, Savi races against the clock to save the day if only she can break out of a curious cycle of dead ends.

programme.title: Thamma
programme.desc: Two destined lovers battle supernatural forces, family ties, and nature itself to defend their forbidden romance in a mystical world where ancient powers and prophecies threaten to keep them apart.

programme.title: Naya Raasta
programme.desc: Chander, a criminal lawyer, gives up his successful career and returns to his ancestral village. There, he comes face-to-face with social problems such as casteism, untouchability and poverty.

programme.title: Extraa Shots Kabir Singh
programme.desc: Watch behind the scenes and meet the cast and crew of the movie.

programme.title: Extraaa Storiez Kgf: Chapter 2

programme.title: Aankh Micholi
programme.desc: Three cousins, Laadli Chibber, Bajrang Das Khatri and Shikhar Randhawa, embrace the warmth of a new city when they move to Mumbai, but they also face challenges that transform their lives.

programme.title: Ajanabee
programme.desc: Middle-classed Rohit (Rajesh Khanna) falls in love with rich Reshmi (Zeenat Aman) and marries her. But fate has other plans and he gets arrested for the murder which he never committed.

programme.title: Bahubali 2 The Conclusion
programme.desc: The story continues in this sequel as Bahubali's son Shiva (Prabhas), seeks revenge after learning about the reason behind his father's death

programme.title: Jhootha Kahin Ka
programme.desc: Karan and Varun go to Mauritius to study but decide to stay back as they enjoy their new lifestyle. However, things take an unusual turn when their parents come to stay with them.

programme.title: Mister Mummy
programme.desc: A grumpy teacher and his kind wife clash on the subject of children, but a rare twist of fate leads them to connect in ways they never thought possible.

programme.title: Tu Jhoothi Main Makkar
programme.desc: To earn extra cash, Mickey helps couples break up. However, life gets complicated when he falls for Tinni, a career woman with an independent streak.

programme.title: Jhund
programme.desc: A retired sports teacher who founded an NGO called Slum Soccer. He managed to rehabilitate street kids by keeping them off drugs and crime by turning them into soccer players and building a whole team

programme.desc: Four wildly different stories overlap at the whims of fate, chance and one eccentric criminal.

programme.desc: On a trip to India, Jasmeet's father forcefully marries her off to Arjun. However, when they return to London, Jasmeet announces her intention of marrying her boyfriend, Charlie Brown.

programme.desc: When Ranno's husband Trilok dies, her life and family slowly start to fall apart. How will her family recover?

programme.desc: A secretary's manager tells her to find a match for his nephew who does not want to get married. The nephew rejects every proposal and falls in love with the secretary instead.

programme.desc: The trials and tribulations a couple has to undergo due to the dynamics between their respective mothers.

programme.title: Poongodi
programme.desc: Poongodi rises above her father's male chauvinism, intent on proving herself & pursuing a college education. Her path crosses with Saravanan, a naïve young man who blindly trusts his manipulative stepmother. Uncover the fate of the two kindred souls.

programme.title: Punitha
programme.desc: Maragatham holds her step-daughter Punitha dear, to the point of being overbearing. However, their bond turns twisted & burdened when Punitha finds her soulmate, Kabilan. Amidst family betrayals, can Punitha show her mother the true meaning of love?

programme.title: MANAMAGALE VAA
programme.desc: Narmada's mission to her ancestral village to reunite her father & his estranged family entwines with Kathir's task of finding suitable grooms for his three sisters. What unfolds when they fall in love, striving for a cause against the same enemy?

programme.title: VINODHINI

programme.title: PUTHU VASANTHAM
programme.desc: Raised as a single child, Selvi longs for the loving embrace & heart-warming bond of a joint family. And when her dream comes true, watch her battle all odds & win over her husband's large family.

programme.title: LAKSHMI
programme.desc: Maha, her family’s financial backbone, marries Selvam, on condition that she will continue to support her family financially even after marriage. Post which they confront challenges that put the family’s peace and happiness to test.

programme.title: IRU MALARGAL
programme.desc: When secrets, societal pressure, and an unexpected wedding come between three childhood friends-Aadhi, Magizhini, and Madhiyazhagi-tradition and emotions clash, turning their lives upside down and testing every bond they hold dear.

programme.title: AADUKALAM
programme.desc: Sathya loves her sister like a second mother & believes compassion outweighs all riches. But, Selvanayagi, a woman of pride & privilege, worships money & social status. When their worlds collide, what trials will Sathya face in her fight for justice?

programme.title: Movie- SABARI

programme.title: Annam

programme.desc: Abandoned by her father and coping with an alcoholic brother, Kayal works as a nurse to be her family's sole provider. She finds happiness in her sacrifice to meet the needs of her brother and sisters. Watch Kayal stand tall in her selfless journey.

programme.title: Marumagal
programme.desc: Aathirai's unyielding passion for helping others constantly lands her in trouble, while Prabhu's self-serving actions show disregard for his own family's well-being. Follow their tumultuous journeys as fate brings them together in marriage.

programme.title: Pathu Thala - EP 1
programme.desc: An undercover police officer embarks on a mission to capture a crime boss and rescue a politician. However, what he discovers forces him to rethink his views on good and evil.

programme.title: Free Ticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Free Ticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: En Peyar Surya En Veedu India - EP 1
programme.desc: Surya, a tough soldier with anger issues, gets kicked out of the army. Now, he needs a shrink's approval to rejoin and fulfill his dream of serving at the border.

programme.title: Ko 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: When Kumaran, an ordinary citizen, abducts the chief minister of the state of Tamil Nadu, the whole nation wonders what could have compelled a seemingly innocent man to adopt such a drastic step.

programme.title: Thalaivi - EP 1
programme.desc: J Jayalalithaa, a prolific actress, is encouraged by her mentor, M G Ramachandran, to join politics. However, she faces a difficult challenge in the form of a male-dominated political environment.

programme.title: Nota - EP 1
programme.desc: After a CM is charged with corruption, he is forced to pass the baton to his son. He with no political experience, finds himself stuck to the chair.

programme.title: The Greatest Of All Time - EP 1
programme.desc: Gandhi is a hostage negotiator, field agent, and spy working for the Special Anti-Terrorist Squad (SATS). After years of service, he is called back for a critical mission that sets him on a dangerous collision course with his own past.

programme.title: Uriyadi 2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Lenin Vijay, a young man, gets a job at a factory with two friends. When he discovers the factory is violating environmental norms and causing deaths, he fights for justice.

programme.title: Game Changer - EP 1
programme.desc: Ram Nandan, a government official, embarks on a relentless fight against corrupt politicians. Determined to bring about fair elections, he tries to revolutionise the way the government operates.

programme.title: Masooda - EP 1
programme.desc: A single mother Neelam and her daughter Nazia face horror as an evil force intrudes. With help from neighbor Gopi, they confront danger and persevere.

programme.title: Kedi Billa Killadi Ranga - EP 1
programme.desc: Kesavan and Murugan are friends who aim to make it big in politics by trying to impress people with their weird tricks. They pay no heed to others' advice and are rejected by their love interests.

programme.title: Free Ticket - EP 1
programme.desc: The host presents a curated compilation of hit songs and memorable snippets from the most popular and trending Tamil movies, celebrating the best of Tamil cinema.

programme.title: Ezra - EP 1
programme.desc: Priya and Ranjan have paranormal experiences after she buys an antique box from a dealer. They learn that the box is a dybbuk and take the help of a rabbi to learn its history.

programme.title: Thondan - EP 1
programme.desc: Narayanan, a politician's son, assaults Vishnu when his brother dies in his ambulance. Later, he makes Vishnu's life miserable by bribing the local police officers and government officials.

programme.title: Ghosty - EP 1
programme.desc: Police officer, pursuing outlaw who escaped her father's custody 20 years ago, accidentally shoots someone else in a failed shootout.

programme.title: Jsk Janaki Vs State Of Kerala - EP 1

programme.desc: Florence has met Maggie and her interest in the young woman is jeopardising her relationship with Leon. Ricardo puts work first, to the detriment of his classes and gets into trouble. Julietta and Ricardo are concerned about him, but their discussion soon turns into an argument.

programme.desc: While he is taking his wife to hospital to give birth, Thomas hits and kills a young man on the road. The young man's mother Marie-France, is devastated. Nine years later, without revealing her identity, she becomes Thomas' secretary and gets more and more involved in his life.

programme.title: Foreigners
programme.desc: Jim, 15, is deeply shaken by the arrival of Neil, his British father whom he hasn't seen in five years. The teenager is about to be adopted by his stepfather, with whom he has formed a true bond. But Neil refuses to give up his parental rights...

programme.title: Movie - Chokka Thangam
programme.desc: Muthu's sister gets married, but her in-laws put forward a condition that Muthu must marry the groom's sister if he wants his sister to be happy. Muthu finds himself at a crossroads as he is in love with someone else.

programme.title: Movie - Naan Avan Illai
programme.desc: A man is accused by four women of cheating them in various disguises and roles. However, he denies their allegations and claims to be a lookalike.

programme.title: Movie - Putham Pudhu Payanam
programme.desc: Three people who have blood cancer meet another rich guy with the same condition at a hospital. They all have only a few months to live. Over time, they become friends, leave hospital, and go to a village which is being terrorized.

programme.title: Movie - Kaadhal Pisase
programme.desc: Vasantha, the son of a maid, pursue higher education as he aspires to have a successful career. However, his life takes a drastic turn when several circumstances force him to become a criminal.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Dumm Dumm Dumm
programme.desc: Adhitya and Ganga, who do not wish to marry, slowly start falling in love with each other. However, when their wedding is cancelled due to a family feud, they decide to reunite their families.

programme.title: Movie - Osthe
programme.desc: Velan hates his stepfather and his half-brother Balan. As a police officer, he makes an enemy in a local politician, who uses the hostility between the stepbrothers to fulfil his own nefarious plans.

programme.title: Movie - Dharma Durai
programme.desc: Dharmadurai, a village doctor, turns alcoholic after his brothers create problems in his love life that force his lover to commit suicide. However, meeting an old friend changes his life for good.

programme.title: Movie - Pollaathavan (New)
programme.desc: Prabhu is dejected when he learns that his bike has been stolen. He decides to find the people who stole the bike, but lands in trouble when he realises that his bike has been used to transport drugs.

programme.title: Movie - Mr. Local
programme.desc: Manohar constantly finds himself in a tussle with Keerthana, an egoistical woman, but eventually falls in love with her. However she is far from thinking that he is good enough for her.

programme.title: Movie - Asuravatham
programme.desc: Samayan receives a call from a stranger who keeps threatening him by saying that he will be killed within a duration of one week. Later, Samayan decides to pursue the stranger on his own.

programme.title: Movie - Vetrikkani
programme.desc: This movie stars Anand Babu, Jeevitha, Delhi Ganesh, Senthiv Nagaiah and Krishn, and is directed by Rama Narayanan.

programme.title: Movie - Koil Yanai
programme.desc: Raja and Kaveri are childhood friends who fall in love with each other. Kaveri's mother wants her to get married to her uncle, but the temple elephant helps the lovers unite.

programme.title: Fillers
programme.desc: KTV HD presents you round-the-clock Kollywood movies, from the latest blockbusters to classics of the yesteryear!

programme.title: Movie - Ennamma Kannu
programme.desc: Kaasi, a womaniser, tries to woo Gayatri, a young woman, but she thwarts his advances. However, when her fiance deserts her on the day of her wedding, Kaasi offers her refuge.

programme.title: Movie - Bheesma
programme.desc: A wise-cracking meme creator gets the chance to prove himself to the girl he loves when he is suddenly appointed to be the CEO of her workplace.

programme.title: Movie - Siva Manasula Sakthi
programme.desc: During a chance encounter on a train, Siva and Sakthi lie to each other about their professions. After the truth comes out, a series of hilarious incidents ensue because of the duo's efforts to exact revenge upon each other.

programme.title: Movie - Bramman
programme.desc: Siva, a movie buff, owns a cinema theatre, which runs into financial trouble. However, his life changes for the better when he meets his childhood friend who is now a famous movie director.

programme.title: Movie - Yaradi Ne Mogini
programme.desc: Vasu falls in love with Keerthi, but when he expresses his feelings to her, she turns him down and says that her marriage has already been arranged. He later learns that she is set to marry his close friend Cheenu.

programme.title: Senior PGA Championship 2026
programme.desc: The Senior PGA Championship, established in 1937, is the oldest of the 5 major championships in men's senior golf. It is administered by the Professional Golfers' Association of America and is recognized as a major championship by both PGA Tour Champions and the European Senior Tour. The inaugural event was played 88 years ago in 1937 at Augusta National Golf Club. Golfers compete for the prize fund of USD$3.5 million.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW - EP 36
programme.desc: Antoine Semenyo's journey to the Premier League has been anything but straightforward. Starting his career at Bristol City, he had loan spells at Bath City, Newport County and Sunderland. Then, in 2023, the Ghanaian winger moved to Bournemouth and has never looked back. With 30 goals in four seasons on the South Coast, Semenyo established himself as one of the brightest talents in the Premier League and, this season, made the move to Manchester City.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this special one hour episode, we see the best of the World Judo Championships from Budapest where everyone in the world swarms to witness the crowning of 14 world champions. Also, world renowned fighter Teddy Riner experiences his hardest title defense in his career.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. This new format presents Sumo in an authentic, in-depth and entertaining way covering the rules, ranks, match-ups, and more. programme.title: MMA:30
programme.desc: This episode follows former UFC welterweight champion Matt Serra around his hometown in New Jersey for a look at the lighter side of this intense competitor. Ring girl Natasha Wicks shows us that the fighters aren't the only ones with the big guns. Plus a behind the scenes look at the UFC Fan Expo and an interview with MMA legend Chael Sonnen.

programme.title: FS MMA
programme.desc: BodogFIGHT features classic MMA matches involving some of your favorite fighters! This episode features all of the highlights from BodogFIGHT season one showing recaps and highlights of all the MMA scraps that took place in Costa Rica.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Andre Berto vs. Victor Ortiz
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features The Ring Magazine's 2011 Fight of The Year from the Foxwoods Resort in Mashantucket, Connecticut, USA. Undefeated welterweight world champion Andre Berto (27-0, 21 KOs) puts his title on the line against 'Vicious' Victor Ortiz (28-2, 22 KOs) in a fight that restores your passion in the sport of boxing.

programme.title: MEGA Fights In 60 Timothy Bradley vs. Luis Carlos Abregu
programme.desc: MEGA Fights are premiere events from the sport of boxing including HBO World Championship Boxing and historic PPV events plus past, current and future World Champions. This episode features a bout between 2 undefeated fighters, Timothy 'Desert Storm' Bradley (25-0, 11 KOs) vs. Luis Carlos Abregu, aka 'El Potro' (29-0, 23 KOs) from the Agua Caliente Casino, Rancho Mirage in California, USA on July 17, 2010.

programme.title: Judo for the World
programme.desc: Judo for the World features the best competitors in the sport as they compete in a global tour for an opportunity to vie for the gold in the World Judo Championship. In this special one hour episode, we see the best of the World Judo Championships from Budapest where everyone in the world swarms to witness the crowning of 14 world champions. Also, world renowned fighter Teddy Riner experiences his hardest title defense in his career.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Saul (Canelo) Alvarez vs. Ryan Rhodes
programme.desc: The main event in this episode sees Saul (Canelo) Alvarez making his first defense of the WBC light middleweight title, taking on challenger Ryan Rhodes. The bout ends in the final round after a series of unanswered blows. Also on the card, action from former light heavyweight champ Adonis Stevenson.

programme.desc: The top 30 competitors from the Kansas City Qualifier tackle the Kansas City Finals course, which includes such obstacles as the Salmon Ladder, Flying Shelf Grab, Body Prop and Invisible Ladder.

programme.title: KNOCKOUTS! Shane Mosley vs. Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: The main event in this episode is "Sugar" Shane Mosley facing Ricardo Mayorga in a light middleweight title fight, the first of two bouts between the two, that features an exciting last-minute finish. Also on the card, action from former champs Juan Manuel Marquez and Juan Diaz.

programme.title: FS Grand Sumo
programme.desc: For the first time the top ranked sumo competitors in the world are featured in an action packed series, FIGHT SPORTS GRAND SUMO. Show 3 featuring Kotoyuki, Asanoyama, Aoiyama and Ryuden from the Kyushu basho, 2019.

programme.title: Macho: The Hector Camacho Story
programme.desc: This series takes a hard-hitting look at the rise, fall and untimely death of one of boxing's most colorful champions. Hector Camacho's dynamic speed, footwork and power made him a fighter to be reckoned with, but it was his flamboyance and showmanship that ushered in a new era in boxing. The series chronicles his epic battles inside the ring, his struggles with addiction outside of it and the mystery of the double homicide that claimed his life.

programme.title: Tuesday Night Fights Hector Camacho vs. Rusty Derouen
programme.desc: FIGHT SPORTS revisits some of Hector Camacho's best fights from the legendary USA's Tuesday Night Fights series alongside our new documentary series Macho: The Hector Camacho Story. In this episode Hector 'Macho' Camacho (46-3-0, 20 KO) battles Rusty Derouen (33-6-0, 25 KO) in a 10-round Halbmittel contest from Erie, Pennsylvania, USA.

programme.title: Teletubbies (S1) - EP 88
programme.desc: Tinky Winky, Dipsy, Laa-Laa and Po take it in turns to listen to music through a pair of headphones. The Teletubbies love dancing to the music they hear.

programme.title: Yakka Dee (S4) - EP 2
programme.desc: Dee encourages a friend to say 'gloves' and we go on a whirlwind word adventure. We see lots of different types of gloves - green gloves, woolly gloves, fingerless gloves and glowing gloves!

programme.title: Messy goes to OKIDO (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Messy gets pins and needles and causes chaos at the OKIDO musical statues competition.

programme.title: Mojo Swoptops (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Mojo Swoptops and best buddy Bo love to help their friends in the little town of Swoppiton. With a swop of Mojo's top and Bo's brilliant plans, they make an unstoppable team!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 46
programme.desc: Bingo and Lila are excited to play on their new waterslide.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 45
programme.desc: At the chemist, Bluey and Bingo have fun playing with the CCTV screens.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 12
programme.desc: When they're accidentally shut in the shed, Duggee shows the Squirrels how to make the time pass with calm breathing and made-up games. The Squirrels cope so well. Does Duggee?

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Duggee forgets how to woof, Duggly comes to visit, Roly celebrates Potato Time, and Billy teaches everyone the Bugatron dance!

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 24
programme.desc: Kyan's invited to perform a dragon dance for Chinese New Year in Beijing. Glitch decides to build a fire breathing dragon robot for the parade and The Go Jetters need to stop it!

programme.title: Bluey (S1) - EP 44
programme.desc: Bingo and Bluey have five minutes to bed, just enough time to race to the summit of Mount Mumandad. But for them, facing powerful storms, avalanches and stinky spots will take teamwork.

programme.title: Bluey (S2) - EP 47
programme.desc: Mum bans the girls from saying the word 'dunny' because it's not a word the Queen of England would use, but the kids try and trick her into saying it anyway.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 11
programme.desc: Dad agrees to play Sheepdog with Bluey and Bingo to stop them from disturbing Mum who is taking a well-earned rest, but looking after a sheep is harder work than they expected.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 12
programme.desc: Mum and Dad vow to only finish their boring housework when the kids stop acting silly, but that's never going to happen, so they end up trying the same approach themselves.

programme.title: Andy's Baby Animal Missions (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Andy encounters some baby Lar Gibbons in Thailand that appear to be flying as they swing through the rainforest.

programme.title: Playtime Towers (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Bella and Lift enjoy making funny honk noises with tubes. They visit Tincy the Spider, who uses terrific tubes to make music with the Playtimers.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 20
programme.desc: The squirrels have arrived and they're all a little bit hyped up with bundles of energy. Things are starting to get a bit frantic, and Duggee needs to calm them all down. Fortunately, he has his Yoga Badge.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Duggee has a package that needs delivering right at the other end of the river, and a long way from the clubhouse. It looks like the squirrels are going to have a day out on the boat. Good job Duggee has his River badge!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 18
programme.desc: The squirrels are off for a Jamboree to make some new friends, play games and have a picnic. They meet another group of young animals with their very own version of Duggee but everything they do is different.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 30
programme.desc: Glitch travels to Ontario to find a new teddy bear, but things start to go very wrong...

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 29
programme.desc: Glitch races the Go Jetters across the Academy to find the lost G.O. Dome of the Ancients.

programme.title: Thomas & Friends (S23) - EP 15
programme.desc: Darcy the tunnel boring machine makes some mistakes on her first day, but she soon makes up for it when everyone sees what she can really do.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 15
programme.desc: Sarah, Duck and Plate Girl find some unusual inhabitants in the Plant Section at the shop.

programme.title: Sarah and Duck (S2) - EP 19
programme.desc: Sarah's new colour wheel reminds Rainbow that he has not seen his niece in a while.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 32
programme.desc: The Town Hall clock is broken, it's lost its Ding Dong. It will take hours to fix, so Stanley asks noisy Fred if he will shout "DING DONG" when the big hand is pointing up.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 31
programme.desc: Cynthia is working on the bus so asks Stanley to take her passengers to the community centre. He uses Amare's tractor and trailer, his car, a boat, and a bath to make a Bus-Train.

programme.title: Funny Talking Animals (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: Flipping pancakes, baking cakes, and homemade sauce from the shops, the animals share all the things they love about cooking.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 42
programme.desc: It's snowing outside, but JoJo and Gran Gran are cosy in the kitchen making gingerbread biscuits. JoJo knows exactly what shape to make. There's plenty of help from Ned, Monty and Jared too.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 41
programme.desc: On a trip to the beach, Mum teaches Bluey to throw, while Bingo and Dad get creative with a funny shaped stick.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 42
programme.desc: Bluey wants to know why Dad's always bossing her around.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 43
programme.desc: When Bluey needs some assistance drawing a dragon for a story she is working on, she asks her dad, Bandit, for help.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 47
programme.desc: Bing Bong - there's somebody at the door. It's delivery Chipmunk with a parcel for Duggee, but why is it wrapped up like a present? Maybe its Duggee's birthday!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 46
programme.desc: The squirrels are playing in the clubhouse. Naughty Monkey arrives and causes chaos! He later returns to his home to relax when there is a knock at his door. It's his cousins, come to visit.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Water, water, everywhere - there's a flood in our hospital soap opera! Grown-up Tag the firefighter splashes around. It's a good job grown-up Happy the lifeguard is on hand

programme.title: Go Jetters (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Inspired by her hero Amelia Earhart, Xuli attempts a solo flight across the Atlantic.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 10
programme.desc: Grapefruit dedicates the song "All My Friends" to the pals who go with her everywhere.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S2) - EP 9
programme.desc: Leek won't let the conditions backstage stop him from singing "Can't Hold Me Down".

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 45
programme.desc: Supertato and Carrot are looking for ice and think Evil Pea has become kind by giving them some. They soon realise it's not Evil Pea after all.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 46
programme.desc: Carrot wants to become super strong, so she restores Evil Pea's robot suit for herself.

programme.desc: The Teletubbies swap places in the Tubby Car and drive to the Hidey Hup. They swap places again on the Tubby Uppy Downy before going up and down.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 52

For the COTD segment, Cakey and Parrot show us how to make adorable safari snacks.

programme.desc: Cutter gets a chance to be a "mom" when a newly hatched dragon bonds with him, and they'll both be needed to get the others out of a tangled mess.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Ian starts to sleepwalk around Harmony Harbor, TZG secretly guides him back to his own bed where he can continue sleeping safely. / When Felicia wants to run an obstacle course for the first time but is afraid she’ll embarrass herself, TZG secretly boosts her confidence by helping with practice.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: When Harper is missing an ingredient to make her Mom’s favorite dessert on Mother’s Day, Eden enlists the help of her fellow Dew Drops to do an emergency city-wide ingredient search! / When Marcus records a video of his inventions, Phoebe gets caught on camera and must erase the footage before Marcus sees, or her Dew Drop cover will be blown!

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Pirate Captain says he doesn't want to be the captain anymore. Noddy investigates how they can help him and he soon finds the reason for the Captain's distress: someone took his beard! Noddy sets out in search of the missing beard.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 18
programme.desc: Revs and Tractor are doing Tom's deliveries together, but only Tractor comes back. Why isn't Revs with Tractor? Tractor is too upset to explain what happened, so Noddy investigates to find his friend.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 19
programme.desc: It's the Toyland Circus and all the toys are rehearsing an act - all except Smartysaurus, who rushes away, apparently too shy to take part. Noddy has to find a way to help Smartysaurus find an act for the circus.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 20
programme.desc: Action-hero Deltoid suddenly loses all his strength and finds himself totally helpless. Noddy quickly starts an investigation: How can he help Deltoid get his strength back?

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 38
programme.desc: The Gabby Cats put their own spin on the classic fairytales "Rapunzel," "The Princess and the Pea," and "Little Red Riding Hood." For the Cat of the Day Segment, CatRat sings a song!

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Kelp is swept by an ocean current to the shore of Unicorn Land where he sees a majestic creature on a cliff that looks just like him, but not like his Narwhal family under the sea. Kelp tells his family he’s a unicorn. / Kelp returns to Unicorn Land where he meets Pixie and Juniper, who show him around and introduce him to unicorn spark and magic.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: When Kelp is introduced to crunchy tacos in Unicorn Land, he must use his bubble sparks to bring them back to his family underwater. / Kelp’s unicorn friends are going to teach him Swishbee on land. But it rains and the game is called off until Kelp shows them that playing in the water can be even more fun.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 13
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch pretend to be their favorite comic book heroes and help the dogs of Pawston. But when Frank and Beans pretend to be villains it’s up to Chaser and Chewer to stop the trouble makers and save the day. \ It’s Bring Your Own Bowl Night at the Barker house, and Tag and Grandmaw team up to make Great Great Auntie Eunice's Famous Far Fetched Cookies. But the obscure ingredients are hard to find, so they have to team up and go on an adventure.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: When Tag and Scooch break Gilber’s ancient Golden Slipper, they embark on an adventure to a secret cave to retrieve the matching slipper. \ For community outreach day, the Race Cadets are paired with an elderly resident of Pawston. It's Tag and Scooch's job to take old dog Leo around town for a day of slow, relaxing activities. But when Leo wants to kickbarx, row and skydive, Tag and Scooch try their best to keep up.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: D-Structs traps the Dinotrux in a deep sinkhole pit - but he overlooks tiny Revvit, who comes up with a plan to help his much-bigger friends.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 70
programme.desc: A swift new recruit joins the school racing team, putting Lucky's dreams of riding out front in jeopardy. Pru and Abigail clash over a class project.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 27
programme.desc: When the Croods return to Ahhh! Valley they find that the evil Brood family has taken over and Grug must work with fellow Valleyites to defeat them

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 28
programme.desc: Sandy becomes jealous when the family gets an adorable monkhuahua/Eep and Thunk act like lazy "slaks" instead of doing their schoolwork and chores

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders discover a mysterious object filled with secrets during their search for Dagur the Deranged.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hiccup, Toothless and the Dragon Riders journey to Glacier Island in search of the Snow Wraith, a fearsome dragon that holds key to the Dragon Eye's mysteries.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: A mysterious figure helps Po escape the guards, so Po makes his way to a desert market, determined to prove Blade wrong for leaving him behind. But when he accidentally stumbles into Klaus and Veruca, he and Blade awkwardly reunite while giving chase, and work through their differences. But the mysterious figure has followed Po and tries to capture them, clearly a new threat to our team.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: With a map from the comic book, Po and Blade make the treacherous journey through the desert to the lost city, and once inside they find the guardian of the fire whip, Rukhmini. The mysterious figure, a stag named Colin, forges an uneasy alliance with Klaus and Veruca.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 33
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 34
programme.desc: There's a mystery in the dollhouse! When things start to mysteriously disappear around the dollhouse, Gabby and Pandy play detectives, using all their senses to find clues, follow them, and solve the mystery. For our COTD segment, CatRat and Baby Me-Owls show us how to make ice cube paints!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Baby Corp babies start aging, panic hits the office and the babies set out to find out if someone has been tainting the formula

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: The annual baby pageant approaches, but Staci’s plan to win may have a negative effect

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Boss Baby struggles to take a sick day even though a mysterious baby cry is wreaking havoc on the neighborhood baby-love

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: George and Harold transform the school's mysterious student into a giant clay monster who turns the entire town into clay

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: George and Harold transform their new Spanish teacher into a superhero after they feel guilty for pranking him, but their teacher loves it and gets carried away

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: After Erica convinces them that being suspended is a great vacation, George and Harold pull off every prank they can think of in order to get suspended

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 26
programme.desc: When the team is framed for the events of Ms. Nowhere's party, they're arrested and are on their way to separate government facilities. It's up to Frostee, with a help from Sissy, to track down the team and bust them out before they're locked up for good!

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: Hiccup, Mala, Astrid, Fishlegs, and Snotlout go searching for the now captured Eruptodon, but little do they know that Viggo has a sinister plan.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 41
programme.desc: When a distant cousin of the Twins named Gruffnut arrives on Dragon's Edge, Tuffnut tries to impress him, but Gruffnut may not be the hero he seems.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: When Viggo puts a bounty on Hiccup's head, every Dragon Hunter in the world is after capturing Hiccup, so Toothless and the Riders must rescue him.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: TheTrollhunters struggle to keep Trolls a secret in Arcadia.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 41
programme.desc: To stop the crime wave that has been hitting Arcadia, the Trollhunters must search for a missing Troll.

programme.title: Trollhunters: Tales of Arcadia S2 - EP 42
programme.desc: When Strickler tempts Jim to use dark magic in his training, it hits the school faculty in an unexpected way!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: The Dragon Knights make a deal for the Storm Wheel but first must obtain the other Storm Wheel from a mysterious mad scientist. Though Mastodon continues to warn the team about the dangers in using the Tianshang Weapons, they use them in a fight against Klaus and Veruca. The clash of the weapons wakes a dormant volcano!

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 20
programme.desc: The Mad Scientist turns out to be an ally called Akna, who has a history with Blade's brother Alfie. And Blade learns another truth about her brother and his mission. And in the course of a skirmish with Klaus and Veruca, the weapons change hands again.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 14
programme.desc: After last season’s victory, Aja and Krel struggle to relocate Mothership back to their Arcadia Oaks neighborhood, but their task is complicated when Toby and Eli discover the Royals’ Akiridion secret.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Aja and Krel hitch a ride in Stuart’s old UFO on a mission to rescue Vex from a bounty hunter outpost on the Moon. Meanwhile, Zadra receives intel about Morando from a surprising new ally.

programme.title: 3Below: Tales of Arcadia S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: With Morando and his Armada heading for Earth, Aja and Krel clash with Vex and Zadra over how to handle the situation. Vex and Zadra want to alert human authorities, while the Royal teens seek out a more creative solution -- video games.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 5
programme.desc: A group of fire ants swarm the city and it's up to Burn to race their leader in order to get them to leave. However, a worried Chet gets in the way. // The crew travels to Mississippi for a race in the swamp. When Skidmark goes missing, they fear he has been taken by a creepy mythological creature.

programme.title: Turbo F.A.S.T. S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: On the day Turbo unveils a new cologne he has created, birds suddenly start attacking the city and it's up to the crew to figure out how to get rid of the feathery menaces before anyone gets eaten/Travelling through the desert to visit a kid snail who is sick, the crew runs afoul of a villainous sheriff who puts them in jail until Turbo agrees to throw a race.

programme.title: Archibald's Next Big Thing S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Archibald's Souper Stew is a surprise hit with the residents of Crackridge. Archibald and his pal Bea reminisce about how they first met.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: It's the day of the Toyland Singalong and Clockwork Mouse, an enthusiastic but awful singer, says everything must be perfect! But then her precious key goes missing and Noddy need to quickly investigate: Who stole Clockwork Mouse's key?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 10
programme.desc: The banner for Revs' Air show has disappeared. Where can it be ? Could someone be trying to spoil Revs' show? Noddy investigates.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 11
programme.desc: When the brightest star in the sky falls, Noddy has to find it and work out how to get it back into its place in the sky before its light goes out forever. Will he manage in time for the fairies Sparkle party ?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: A strange new kind of butterfly is pestering the toys in Toyland - just when the Queen organises a butterfly ball. Noddy has to find out what's going on fast !

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Elephant had no nose. He couldn't swat away the flies, or scrub his belly… he couldn't even blow his nose. Then one day snappy Crocodile snapped! Crocodile pulled and he pulled and he pulled… until Ker-doing!!! Crocodile let go and Elephant's nose was all long and wiggly! And that's why Elephant has a trunk. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Snake did have legs… hundreds and hundreds of them. But poor old Snake had no eyes, not a single eye on his head. Then on the day of the great Tinga Tinga Festival of Colours Snake quite literally bumped into Millipede who was stuck in a hole. They decided to swap eyes and legs just for one day. So that Snake could see all the wonderful colours and Millipede could run all over Tinga Tinga.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 9
programme.desc: Julian's preparing for "spring has sprung", the Greendale school play, when pat gets a special delivery call. It's a yeti costume for Bill. When Pat is diverted into the countryside by PC Selby, he spots one of Alf's missing sheep - and she's about to have a lamb! Alf can't get there as his quad bike is being fixed, so Pat offers to take the sheep in his van. But the sheep is reluctant to move. Meanwhile, Bill is worried that his costume won't turn up and he'll let his classmates down.

programme.title: Postman Pat: Special Delivery Service S3 - EP 10
programme.desc: Pat has got to deliver special cans of blue dye for Alf to mark up his cheeky runaway sheep. That way, when they get out, he can work out which sheep belong to him! Meanwhile, the kids are having a special delivery service day of their own as Ben gives them a tour of the Sorting Office.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 1
programme.desc: Mr Carburettor is going to ban Flash from Silver hatch unless he learns how to do something useful. Can Flash learn how to be a good marshal in time?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Hellie wants to be able to race like the cars. When he does join in he is accused of cheating. Hellie is upset and the cars annoyed… will they be able to make up before something disastrous happens?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 3
programme.desc: Marsha decides to be a mechanic but wears Big Chris out with her endless questions. Disaster strikes when Chris dozes off and doesn't listen to her properly…

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 4
programme.desc: The loudspeaker system is not working at Silver Hatch. How will Roary be stopped from performing a dangerous stunt on the track?

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: While Hoof is about to do his obstacle course, he finds all the fences knocked down. He blames Bling, who was jealous of the lucky wings he wears on his hoofs, but Bling assures she's got nothing to do with it ! Noddy investigates to settle their argument.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: Strange accidents keep happening on the building site. Clockwork Mouse is convinced that someone is trying to stop them finishing the building. Noddy investigates and finds out things aren't quite as they seem...

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 23
programme.desc: Pat-Pat is doing a magic show but she discovers her magic box is broken. Noddy investigates: Who broke the magic box? He needs to find out soon so that Pat Pat's show can take place.

programme.desc: Armed with a brand new sat-nav from Fuse, the Pirates head off on The Pirate Challenge, sailing all around Toyland. But when they fail to arrive at their first stop in Toy Green, Noddy investigates what's happened. He must set the Pirates back on course to complete the challenge by the end of the day.

programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Burple and Winger each injure a wing while they're with Dak, and only teamwork can get them home. At the roost, Cutter gets stuck in a puddle of goo.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: The Rescue Riders have a "Dragon Day" to show their skills to a young fan, but Aggro skips it to hang out with her new fun -- but reckless -- friends.

programme.title: Team Zenko Go S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Rodney accidentally catches Sam when she falls from a tree and starts to believe he’s a hero TZG secretly follow him around town to make sure his clumsy hero-ing doesn’t go wrong. / When Lula and Luis want a clubhouse for the Squasher Fan Club, TZG secretly help fix up the shed in Luis’ backyard.

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries S1 - EP 19
programme.desc: When Marcus leaves for sleep-away camp, Phoebe discovers that being a "family fairy" means helping everyone in your assigned family, not just the children. / When Tracy hires Cassie to babysit Nicholas, and Eden asks Athena and Phoebe to lend a helping hand, Cassie and the Dews must find a way to get Nicholas to bed without his missing and beloved penguin stuffy.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 21
programme.desc: While Hoof is about to do his obstacle course, he finds all the fences knocked down. He blames Bling, who was jealous of the lucky wings he wears on his hoofs, but Bling assures she's got nothing to do with it ! Noddy investigates to settle their argument.

programme.title: Noddy Toyland Detective S2 - EP 22
programme.desc: Strange accidents keep happening on the building site. Clockwork Mouse is convinced that someone is trying to stop them finishing the building. Noddy investigates and finds out things aren't quite as they seem...

programme.desc: Pat-Pat is doing a magic show but she discovers her magic box is broken. Noddy investigates: Who broke the magic box? He needs to find out soon so that Pat Pat's show can take place.

programme.desc: Armed with a brand new sat-nav from Fuse, the Pirates head off on The Pirate Challenge, sailing all around Toyland. But when they fail to arrive at their first stop in Toy Green, Noddy investigates what's happened. He must set the Pirates back on course to complete the challenge by the end of the day.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 39
programme.desc: It’s Cat-O-Ween in the dollhouse, and all the Gabby Cats are in the holiday spirit. Gabby and Pandy dress up and go trick-or-treating around the dollhouse, where they make cat-o-lanterns with Baby Box, search for hidden treats with MerCat, and make Banana ghosts with Cakey. Along the way, CatRat plays silly tricks on them, but in the end Floyd manages to trick them all! For the Cat of the Day segment, all the Gabby Cats sing a special Cat-O-Ween song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 40
programme.desc: It's Christmas time in the dollhouse! After putting the final topper on the Christmas tree, Figgy the Elf calls and says that Santa Kitty needs help in his workshop, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go help her out. After some toy fixing and boxing fun, Gabby and Pandy get to meet Santa Kitty and his Kitty reindeer and join him delivering presents to all their friends in the dollhouse.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Kelp and Pixie forget about their little sisters and their plans to hang out. Scallop goes to Unicorn Land and meets Juniper. They play and become friends. / The unicorns are eager to play with a new mystery item that washes up on the beach, but what is it? While the other unicorns come up with imaginative ideas of what it could be, Pixie is determined to find out exactly what it is.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Pixie’s pet crab goes into a cave, Kelp uses his knowledge of crabs under the sea to coax him out using dance and rhythm. / Scallop’s special shell is broken, but Kelp transforms the broken bits into something even more special.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 15
programme.desc: Tag and Scooch play Scooch’s favorite board game outside, using the whole town of Pawston as the board. \Tag thinks it’s time for an update to the Pawston City Anthem, which inspires a city-wide music competition where competitors will create and perform new Pawston anthems.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go! S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: When Tag is left in charge of the Pawston Pawtomotive for the day, Frank and Beans open up a rival garage and take all the business. But when all the cars around Pawston break down because of Frank's shoddy mechanic work, Tag and Scooch have to go around town to fix all his mistakes. \ Scooch wants to be a Tail-kwondo master like his hero, Master Wag, but he can't break a biscuit with his tail.

programme.title: Dinotrux S1 - EP 6
programme.desc: Just as Ty Rux welcomes Garby, a loud and smelly Stegarbasaurus, to the crater, Revvit disappears and the gang embarks on a dangerous rescue mission.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free: Riding Academy S3 - EP 71
programme.desc: The PALs make plans for the Valentine's Day dance, then pivot to scare off a group of raiders who've come to rob the headmaster's vault.

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 29
programme.desc: Eep has the first pen pal in Gulp Gorge/Gran sends Ugga and Eep on the first treasure hunt when she decides to pass on her inheritance

programme.title: Dawn Of The Croods S2 - EP 30
programme.desc: Eep and Thunk become obsessed with a new trend known as "quicktogramming"/Grug accidentally causes the first outbreak of a "super bug"

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: The Dragon Riders discover a lush island that turns out to be the home of the Deathsong, a massive dragon that threatens to trap them forever.

programme.title: Dragons: Race to the Edge S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: On an island that will make the perfect outpost, the Dragon Riders discover its indigenous residents are a mysterious new breed of dragon.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: In order to earn the fire whip, Po and Blade have to get themselves and Rukhmini out of a lost city with no exits, but Rukhimi’s not exactly who she says she is. Our villains’ alliance shatters when Colin realizes the weasels are mages with magical powers, and he leaves Klaus gravely injured.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Klaus is injured and Veruca’s mage powers are not working, stifled by her time in prison. They encounter a dangerous village and Veruca reconnects with her abilities in time to save Klaus, but the two are soon captured by Po and Blade, who are unaware of Veruca’s rekindled powers.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 35
programme.desc: When CatRat gets stuck on planet Caturn, it's up to Gabby and Pandy to go save him. DJ Catnip teaches them a song to remember how to get there and Baby Box helps them make jetpacks so they can zip around. In the Cat-osphere, they take a twirl through Space Swirls and zip through the Supergallactic Doughnut Hole and even meet DJ Catnip's cousin, DJ Comet! For the Cat of the Day Segment, Baby Box and DJ Comet show us how to craft a papier-mâché Caturn.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 36
programme.desc: When the Gabby Cats get stuck in the leaves of an overgrown cupcake tree, it's up to Gabby, Pandy and cupcake-expert Cakey to work together to shrink the overgrown cupcake tree branch by branch--and to save CatRat from where he's stuck at the top! For our COTD segment, Cakey sings a song!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse S2 - EP 37
programme.desc: Kitty Fairy's garden is transformed into a fairy-riffic fairground for The Fairy Festival! At the festival, Gabby and Pandy meet an excitable little fairy named Luli-loo who joins them as they explore the festival. Luli-loo may not be the best at all the fair games, but she's never afraid to give it a go and learn from her mistakes!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Mom and Dad Templeton do the unthinkable: leave Boss Baby and Tim under the authority of a babysitter!

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Mom tries to help Tim get over his fear of the neighborhood crazy-cat-lady

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in Business S1 - EP 9
programme.desc: Mega Fat CEO Baby holds a game day at Baby Corp and Boss Baby must find a way to beat Mega Fat CEO Baby at his own game

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 10
programme.desc: After being made fun of for sitting in chocolate pudding, George and Harold go into hiding only to come back to find that everybody has forgotten who they are

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: Tired of mean Mr. Krupp, the boys go back in time to prevent him from becoming a bully, but discover that their plan has backfired when they return to the present

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: In order to retrieve Mr. Krupp’s locked up rule book, George and Harold use an invention that ends up turning against them

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1) - EP 6
programme.desc: For tonight's dinner party, Jake is making two of his simplest, most beloved recipes. You'll only need one bowl to make his moist, jammy olive oil cake and one sheet pan to create his baked gnocchi.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping (S5) - EP 69
programme.desc: The team scores a major deal when Dolmar is offered a low-price on a home in a desirable neighbourhood in South Tampa. After some debate, the decision is made to turn the home into a long-term rental.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes (S2) - EP 37
programme.desc: Rachael raids her well-stocked pantry to make chicken chow fun, a fan-favourite recipe centred on wavy Chinese noodles, paired with chicken, sauteed vegetables and traditional Chinese sauces.

programme.title: Hit-and-Miss Tour (S1) - EP 16
programme.desc: It's Seyun's birthday during their trip to Singapore. To celebrate, they decide to stay in a nice hotel for one night. But what consequences will Seyun's statement bring?

programme.title: Little Girl In The Window
programme.desc: When amateur photographer Iris notices "HELP" scrawled on a dusty window in a picture she took of a house, she becomes increasingly convinced that the man living there isn't as mild-mannered as he seems.

programme.title: 1,000 Ways to Dine - EP 17
programme.desc: The restaurants in this episode might be a little scary, but they also serve up food that's scarily good! Join host Michael Yo on a visit to a Tokyo restaurant dedicated to vampires.

programme.title: I Thought My Husband's Wife Was Dead
programme.desc: Wife and expectant mother Lola seems to have it all: the big house, a dashing husband, and a thriving restaurant. But Lola's perfect life is interrupted when a ghost from the past suddenly shows up.

programme.title: Secret Life Of The Surgeon's Wife
programme.desc: When Julia suspects her dental surgeon husband is having an affair, she works to obtain proof before she can initiate a divorce rather than risk losing control of the charity they've built together.

programme.desc: Chef Deborah VanTrece blends flavours from Latin and South America, adding her southern charm to create encocado shrimp with poblano-stuffed grits, also known as Latin shrimp and grits.
